message:
test(cli): pin that `cass models remove` defaults to interactive reclamation

Add `models_remove_defaults_to_interactive_reclamation` to the CLI
lifecycle contract suite. It parses

  cass models remove --data-dir /cass/models

and asserts the parsed `ModelsCommand::Remove` binds to:

  - the default model name `all-minilm-l6-v2`
  - `yes: false` (destructive confirmation still required)
  - `data_dir: Some("/cass/models")` (scoped, not the global default)

The complementary row `models_remove_requires_explicit_model_and_yes_controls`
already pins the path where caller supplies `--yes`; this new row
pins the opposite default so an accidental flip of the `yes` flag's
default (e.g. through a clap `default_value`/`action` refactor) is
caught at contract-test time rather than in production when an
agent loses a model cache without an interactive prompt.

Pure test addition — no behavior change, no new CLI surface.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
